Explain what you changed (e.g., "Added % to order channels" or "Fixed encoding for Polish names").

Closes # [Insert Issue Number here]

## ✅ Checklist

- [ ] Figures/Images are correctly referenced
- [ ] Polish diacritics (ę, ó, ł) render correctly
